security.csp: default-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost; script-src 'self'; img-src 'self' data:;

bundle.shortDescription: Personal Rust + Tauri password vault with recovery-candidate generator.
bundle.longDescription: PassHound — a personal password vault and recovery-candidate generator. Argon2id KDF, XChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD, offline-only. See https://github.com/not-tivia/passhound.
